title: Instrument d'approbation français
text_preview: 1, the undersigned, Inorvald STOLTENBERG, Minister of Foreign Affairs of Norway, hereby authorize and empower Mr. Arne LANGELAND, Ambassador of Norway in Paris, to sign, subject to the approval of the Storting, the Convention concerning the construction and operation of a European Synchrotron Radiation Facility. Oslo, on this sixteenth day of December, One Thousand Nine Hundred and Eighty-eight

pages.text:
1, the undersigned,

Inorvald

STOLTENBERG,

Minister of Foreign Affairs of Norway, hereby authorize and empower Mr. Arne LANGELAND, Ambassador of Norway in

Paris, to sign, subject to the approval of the Storting, the Convention concerning the construction and operation of a European Synchrotron Radiation Facility.

Oslo, on this sixteenth day of December,

One Thousand Nine Hundred and Eighty-eight
